headline: Anthropic set to close $30 billion funding at over $900 billion valuation
summary: Investing.com -- Anthropic PBC is expected to close its latest funding round as soon as next week, with investments potentially exceeding $30 billion at a valuation above $900 billion, according to a Bloomberg report Friday. The financing would make the Claude maker the world's most valuable artificial intelligence startup, surpassing rival OpenAI.

headline: Anthropic to Close Over $30 Billion Round as Soon as Next Week
